# protonpass_item_credit_card (Resource)

Manages a Proton Pass credit card item.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "protonpass_item_credit_card" "example" {
  share_id               = protonpass_vault.example.share_id
  title                  = "My Card"
  cardholder_name        = "John"
  card_number_wo         = "4111111111111111"
  card_number_wo_version = 1
  cvv_wo                 = "123"
  cvv_wo_version         = 1
  expiration_date        = "2027-12"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `share_id` (String) Share ID of the vault.
- `title` (String) Title of the credit card item.

### Optional

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `card_number_wo` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Card number (write-only, never stored in state).
- `card_number_wo_version` (Number) Increment to trigger card number update.
- `cardholder_name` (String) Name of the cardholder.
- `cvv_wo` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) CVV/CVC code (write-only, never stored in state).
- `cvv_wo_version` (Number) Increment to trigger CVV update.
- `expiration_date` (String) Expiration date in YYYY-MM format.
- `pin_wo` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Card PIN (write-only, never stored in state).
- `pin_wo_version` (Number) Increment to trigger PIN update.

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `item_id` (String) Unique identifier of the item.
- `modify_time` (String) Last modification timestamp.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Credit Card items can be imported by specifying the share ID and item ID separated by a colon
terraform import protonpass_item_credit_card.example "share_id:item_id"
```
